welcome.subject: Welcome to TM
welcome.heading: Welcome to TM
welcome.bodyWithDashboard:
Welcome to TM!

We are pleased to let you know that your registration has been completed successfully.You can now log in to the platform using your login credentials.

Username: {username}
Password: {password}

Use these credentials to sign in. For your security, we recommend that you change your password after your first login. Keep these details in a safe place and do not share them with third parties.

Inside your account you can review your personal information, manage your data, and access all the services we have available for you.
welcome.bodyWithoutDashboard:
Welcome to TM!

We are pleased to let you know that your registration has been completed successfully.

Username: {username}
Password: {password}

Use these credentials to sign in. For your security, we recommend that you change your password after your first login. We also recommend keeping them in a safe place and not sharing them with third parties.

Thank you for trusting us!

recovery.subject: Password recovery — TM
recovery.heading: Password recovery
recovery.bodyHtml:
We received a request to reset the password for your TM account.

If this was you, use the button in this email to continue. The link expires according to the applicable security policy.

If you did not request this change, you can ignore this message; your current password will remain valid.

caseCreated.subject: Case {caseCode} created — TM
caseCreated.heading: New case registered
caseCreated.bodyWithLink:
A new case with code {caseCode} has been registered in the system.

From now on, you can fully manage your case, including linking people, managing information, attaching and reviewing documents, and following up on your process.

Thank you for trusting TM with your process.
caseCreated.bodyWithoutLink:
A new case with code {caseCode} has been registered in the system.

Thank you for trusting TM with your process.

otp.subject: Your verification code — TM
otp.heading: Verification code
otp.bodyHtml:
Your password verification code is:

{otpCode}

This code is valid for {expiresMinutes} minutes. For security reasons, do not share it with anyone.
